ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRIAL COURT)
Off Calendar Feb-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for OSC re: sanctions as to defense counsel Kenneth L. Haddix for his non-appearance at mandatory settlement conference.

Appearances:
KENNETH L. HADDIX, Esq. on behalf of defendants Ramesh Patel and Sona Gems, Inc.
ROBERT L. SMITHTON, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Bay Area Diamond Wholesalers, Inc.

The Court ordered sanctions to Kenneth L. Haddix for his non-appearance at the mandatory settlement conference. $225.00 to opposing counsel Mr. Smithton, and $250.00 to the Court. Sanctions due by 4:30 p.m. on Wednesday Feb. 21, 2007.

JUDGE DONDERO; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: JO ANN BRYCE, #3321 (305)

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Aug-25-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance: Robert Lee Smithton, Esquire, on behalf of the Plaintiff/moving party.

Plaintiff Bay Area Diamond's Application For Writ of Attachment is granted in the amount of $41,431.80. No opposition has been filed. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000.
H (612)

Ntc Of Mtn For Order Compelling Production Of Documents And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-25-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance: Robert Lee Smithton, Esquire, on behalf of the Plaintiff/moving party.

Plaintiff Bay Area Diamond's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents is granted as it seeks an order compelling production of documents. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond and to produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $490, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT (612)

MOTION To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Jun-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
PHILLIP KILDRUFF, ESQ., 415-673-0368 specially appearing for KENNETH LANCE HADDIX and moving party.
ROBERT LEE SMITHTON, ESQ. of ARLAS & SMITHTON, 415-455-0170 for plaintiff opposing party Bay Area Diamond Wholesale, Inc.

RULING
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT RULED ON KENNETH LANCE HADDIX, ESQ.'S MOTION To Be Relieved As Counsel FOR DEFENDANT RAMESH PATEL, SONA GEMS, INC. AS FOLLOW:
COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT MUST PROVIDE NOTICE TO HIS CLIENT REGARDING DISCOVERY, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE AND ALL EVENTS CURRENTLY PENDING. PROOF OF THAT NOTICE IS TO BE GIVEN TO PHILLIP KILDRUFF, ESQ. WHO SPECIALLY APPEARED. WHEN MR. KILDRUFF SUBMITTS TO THE COURT A DECLARATION STATING SUCH PROOF, THE COURT WILL GRANT KENNETH LANCE HADDIX'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AND SIGN THE ORDER THAT MR. KILDRUFF PROVIDES TO THE COURT.
(301/HEK) Judge Harold Kahn, Reporter LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
